context: Tests whether the agent correctly selects ElevenLabs models based on use-case requirements (expressive, stable/multilingual, fast), configures voice via environment variables, and confirms voice selection before committing to long-form output.

checklist.name: eleven_v3 for expressive
checklist.description: Uses eleven_v3 model (or explicitly notes it as default) for the expressive/podcast narration use case

checklist.name: eleven_multilingual_v2 for stability
checklist.description: Uses eleven_multilingual_v2 model for the stable or multilingual content use case

checklist.name: eleven_flash_v2_5 for speed
checklist.description: Uses eleven_flash_v2_5 model for the low-latency or real-time use case

checklist.name: ELEVENLABS_API_KEY preferred
checklist.description: Configuration references ELEVENLABS_API_KEY (not SAG_API_KEY) as the primary environment variable

checklist.name: Voice env var used
checklist.description: Default voice is set via ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID or SAG_VOICE_ID environment variable in the configuration

checklist.name: Voice confirmation step
checklist.description: Script or documentation includes a step to confirm the voice (e.g. runs `sag voices` or lists voice ID) before generating the full long-form output

checklist.name: Model flag syntax correct
checklist.description: Model selection uses the correct sag CLI syntax (e.g. -m eleven_v3 or --model eleven_v3) rather than an API call or config file key

checklist.name: Three distinct configurations
checklist.description: Output contains three separate sag command configurations, each clearly matched to a different use case

checklist.name: No SAG_API_KEY as primary
checklist.description: Does NOT set SAG_API_KEY as the primary/only API key reference — uses ELEVENLABS_API_KEY

checklist.name: Lang flag for multilingual
checklist.description: The multilingual or non-English channel script includes a --lang flag to guide language normalization
